title: A Speech To Save Environment | Explanation in Hindi
description:
When a student is asked to deliver a speech on saving the environment, the real challenge isn't vocabulary — it's understanding *why* the speech is structured the way it is, what rhetorical moves the writer makes, and how to connect deforestation, pollution, and climate urgency into one compelling argument. "A Speech to Save Environment" is a crucial prose piece for CBSE and NCERT students who need to master both comprehension and public speaking craft. This explanation in Hindi breaks down every line so you never lose the thread of the argument, whether you're preparing for board exams or a classroom presentation.
